name: Opal
story: Opal was surrendered by a breeder and has opinions about everything — blankets first among them. She runs warmer than other cats and knows exactly where the heater vent is.
Hairless means low on fur, high on personality: she wants to be under the covers, on your shoulder, or in the conversation. An indoor-only, draft-free home is a must.

medical.notes: Vaccinated and spayed. Sphynx skin needs a gentle monthly bath — instructions included.

photoAlt: Opal, a wrinkly sphynx cat with large ears, looking straight at the camera
